content.claim: Hungary has one of the highest rates of school-based academic selection in OECD countries, with around 85% of Hungarian students in schools that select by academic performance, compared to the OECD average of 43%.
content.context: Fresh live research through the International comparison lens
limitations: Reflects institutional capacity rather than causal effect on student outcomes
Does not indicate whether selection at age 10-12 versus later ages produces differential outcomes
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
